title: Functions as Values, Signatures, and Composition · Composition Studio
summary: Turn repeated validation branches into reusable transformations for an intake service. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a typed composition library with signature evidence while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pass, store, return, and inspect callables while preserving clear input-output contracts.
Model callable parameter and return relationships with precise type annotations.
Compose compatible unary transformations and explain data flow across boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')
